en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.
I can lend you.
A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.
B: I don’t have one either, let’s go buy one.
A: Let’s go buy a pen, shall we?

ab: ai, tratrima’ ku ziya za aivas.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.
A: Let’s go get breakfast, shall we?

ab: ’azi ku auwa, piya ku lra kenama i ruma’.
en: B: No, I’ve already eaten at home.

ab: malalup ku veni’as za ku trinavu.
en: A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.
B: Take it to the heat!
A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let’s eat my lunch box together!

ab: nu kara’alriyan aekan u za eman?
en: A: What do you want to eat for lunch?

ab: aekan ku i kungkuwan kana miēyo na kara’a’alrien.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.

ab: nu kara’alriyan aekan u za eman?
en: A: What do you want to eat for lunch?

ab: mada ku za trinavu zi ta karkanaw nu kara’alriyan!
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I’ve brought a lunchbox today, let’s eat together at noon!
A: Let’s go play basketball, shall we?
B: Okay! Let’s go.
A: Shall we go play baseball?
B: No, I want to study.
A: Please help me with the broom.

ab: ai, anzu ini na idap kuwa varanay kaninu.
en: B: Okay, here’s a broomstick for you.

ab: alakanay ku ziya za tupu a?
en: A: Can you help me with the cloth?

ab: maidap ku zi paalaku i Tanuvak.
en: B: I’m sweeping the floor, you ask Tanuvak to carry it for you.
A: Are you done sweeping?
B: I swept it.
A: Why don’t you clean up?
B: I’ve finished cleaning up.

ab: milritra’ na tairu zi uwa itruli ziya.
en: A: The floor is dirty, go clean it.
B: Okay, I’ll go get the cloth.

ab: izu na lataw milritra’ zi uwa itruli ziya.
ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ab: nu haremay lra, ’azi ku ziya piya midap kani.
ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I’m not done sweeping here yet.
A: What are you doing later?
B: I’m going to see my teacher.

ab: nu muruma’ u kemay kungkuwan mu kakuda u?
en: A: What do you do after school?

ab: salralrangan ku kanaku ali’ mukuwa semenaya.
en: B: I’m going to sing with my friends.

ab: nu muruma’ kemay kungkuwan i intaw mu uri kakuda?
en: A: What’s he doing after school?
B: He’s going swimming.
